title: BeatsAudioAnalysis
description: Per-CID audio quality measurements for a rendered .webm. Produced by scripts/analyze-audio.py (full spectral/loudness analysis) and partially populated at render time from ffmpeg loudnorm output (lufs only). Associated with a share-store CID; one row per CID, last-write-wins.

analyzerVersion.description: Free-form tag identifying the producer (e.g. 'analyze-audio.py@1' or 'ffmpeg-loudnorm').

analyzedAt.description: Unix milliseconds the analysis was produced.

source.description: Which producer wrote this row. 'loudnorm' = lufs only (render-time). 'analyzer' = full spectral. 'merged' = lufs from loudnorm + spectral from analyzer.

lufs.description: ITU BS.1770 integrated loudness. Streaming targets: −16 to −14.

hpfHz.description: HPF cutoff applied before band-ratio computation, if any. 0 = no HPF.
